email.subject: Roof condition check — 1101 Madison St
email.body:
1101 Madison St has been in your portfolio since December 2025. Commercial roofs in Hoboken face salt spray and UV stress that accelerate aging. Without a recent inspection, deferred maintenance costs can spike fast — emergency repairs run 3–4x a planned replacement.

Worth a quick walkthrough to give you a straight read on current roof condition and any near-term risks. Call or reply if that makes sense.
email.signature_line: 16 years serving commercial properties in Northern and Central New Jersey commercial properties.
email.sender_title: Commercial Roofing Advisor, Garden State Commercial Roofing
